sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111036" key="filippi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλιππ-ία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111036.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">love of horses</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">riding,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.5b11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
